invalid_system_mode.message: The mode `{mode}` is not supported by this controller

mode_does_not_support_duration.message: The mode `{mode}` does not support `duration`; use `{attribute}` instead

mode_does_not_support_period.message: The mode `{mode}` does not support `period`; use `{attribute}` instead

mode_does_not_support_temporary.message: The mode `{mode}` can only be set permanently

no_controller_entity.message: The controller entity is not available for the `{service}` service

deprecated_service_without_target.description:
Calling the `evohome.{service}` service without specifying a controller is deprecated and will stop working in the future. Update your automations and scripts to include a target, for example:
`target:
  entity_id: climate.my_home`.
deprecated_service_without_target.title: Calling `{service}` without a target is deprecated

clear_dhw_override.description: Sets the DHW to follow its schedule.
clear_dhw_override.name: Clear DHW override

clear_zone_override.description: Sets a zone to follow its schedule.
clear_zone_override.name: Clear zone override

refresh_system.description: Pulls the latest data from the vendor's servers now, rather than waiting for the next scheduled update.
refresh_system.name: Refresh system

reset_system.description: Resets the system mode and sets all the zones to follow their schedule.
reset_system.name: Reset system

set_dhw_override.description: Overrides the DHW state, either indefinitely, or for a specified period of time, after which it will revert to following its schedule.

duration.description: The DHW will revert to its schedule after this time. If 0 the change is until the next scheduled switchpoint.
duration.name: Duration

state.description: The state to set the DHW to ("on" or "off").
state.name: State

set_dhw_override.name: Set DHW override

set_system_mode.description: Sets the system mode, either indefinitely, or for a specified period of time, after which it will revert to Auto. Not all systems support all modes.

duration.description: The duration in hours; used only with AutoWithEco mode (up to 24 hours).
duration.name: Duration

mode.description: Mode to set the system to.
mode.name: [%key:common::config_flow::data::mode%]

period.description: A period of time in days; used only with Away, DayOff, or Custom mode. The system will revert to Auto mode at midnight (up to 99 days, today is day 1).
period.name: Period

set_system_mode.name: Set system mode

set_zone_override.description: Overrides a zone's setpoint, either indefinitely, or for a specified period of time, after which it will revert to following its schedule.

duration.description: The zone will revert to its schedule after this time. If 0 the change is until the next scheduled setpoint.
duration.name: Duration

setpoint.description: The temperature to be used instead of the scheduled setpoint.
setpoint.name: Setpoint

set_zone_override.name: Set zone override
